hero.headline: Your Smartest Employee Never Takes a Day Off.
hero.subheadline: SmartKhata AI listens to how you run your business — in plain language — and handles every entry, every report, and every rupee automatically. No spreadsheets. No accountant. No stress.
hero.cta_primary: Start Free — No Credit Card Needed
hero.trust_line: Trusted by 10,000+ shopkeepers, freelancers & small businesses across India

features.section_subheading: Forget ledgers, formulas, and confusing software. Just talk to SmartKhata AI the way you talk to your staff.

cards.title: Just Type. It Does the Rest.
cards.body: Say "Sold 3 shirts for ₹450 each" and SmartKhata instantly logs the sale, updates your stock, calculates your margin, and files the entry — in under a second. No forms. No fields. No friction.

cards.title: Real-Time Profit Clarity
cards.body: Know exactly how much you made today, this week, and this month — without opening a single spreadsheet. SmartKhata tracks your income, expenses, and profit live, so you're always in control.

cards.title: GST-Ready Reports, Instantly
cards.body: Generate professional P&L statements, inventory reports, and GST summaries in one tap. Whether it's for your CA or your own peace of mind — your books are always audit-ready.

ai_workflow.section_heading: From One Line of Text to a Complete Financial Record
ai_workflow.section_subheading: SmartKhata AI turns your everyday words into structured, accurate accounting — automatically.

steps.title: You Type Naturally
steps.description: Type or speak in Hindi, English, or Hinglish. "Bought 50 pens for ₹5 each" or "Customer returned 2 shirts, refund ₹900" — SmartKhata understands it all.

steps.title: AI Parses & Classifies
steps.description: Our AI engine identifies the transaction type, extracts item details, quantities, and amounts, then maps it to the correct accounting category — instantly.

steps.title: Records Update Automatically
steps.description: Inventory adjusts. Ledgers update. Profit/loss recalculates. Every number stays accurate without you lifting another finger.

steps.title: Reports Generate on Demand
steps.description: Need your weekly summary or monthly P&L? One tap. SmartKhata compiles clean, professional reports you can share, export, or show your CA directly.

dashboard.section_heading: Everything at a Glance. Nothing Lost in the Numbers.
dashboard.section_subheading: The SmartKhata dashboard gives you a complete, real-time picture of your business — designed for clarity, built for speed.

highlights.description: See exactly what came in today — broken down by product, sale, or category.
Track stock in real-time. Get alerts before you run out. Never lose a sale to a stockout.
Daily, weekly, monthly — your P&L is always fresh, always accurate, always one tap away.
Every entry, timestamped and searchable. Your full business history, always accessible.

dashboard.caption: Clean. Powerful. Built for people running real businesses — not MBA classrooms.

pricing.section_heading: Less Than Your Daily Chai. More Powerful Than a Full-Time Accountant.
pricing.section_subheading: Simple, honest pricing. No hidden fees. No lock-ins.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for freelancers and solo sellers just getting started.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For growing shops and small businesses that need full power.

plans.name: Business
plans.description: For established businesses managing multiple verticals or locations.

pricing.footnote: All plans include bank-grade 256-bit encryption and automatic daily backups. Cancel anytime.

cta.section_heading: Your Books Won't Keep Themselves. But SmartKhata Will.
cta.section_subheading: Join thousands of Indian business owners who've replaced chaos with clarity. Start free in under 60 seconds — no setup, no training, no accountant required.
cta.reassurance: Free forever plan available • No credit card needed • Setup in 60 seconds
